overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic action game showing a hooded character in a white robe with ornate back embroidery ascending a stone staircase inside a Gothic cathedral. The character opens an ornate wooden door and climbs from a dimly lit enclosed stairwell to a brightly lit upper level featuring vaulted ceilings and arched windows.

events.description: character opens the ornate wooden door revealing the dark stairwell beyond

agents.ego_description: approaching and opening an ornate wooden door to enter the cathedral stairwell

entered.detail: large arched wooden door with metal studs and decorative panels
carved stone archway surrounding the entrance door
metal wall-mounted light fixture beside the door

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a hooded character standing before an ornate wooden door in a stone corridor. The character opens the door, revealing a dark stairwell beyond, and steps through the doorway into the enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed stone stairwell with wooden handrail

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone staircase in the dimly lit enclosed stairwell, following the wooden handrail

entered.detail: wide stone steps ascending into the upper levels of the building
dark wooden handrail running along the left wall of the stairwell
rough-hewn stone wall with weathered texture

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a dimly lit stone staircase with a wooden handrail on the left and rough stone walls on the right. The space is narrow and enclosed, with the camera following steadily behind as the character climbs upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic vaulted stairwell with architectural columns

events.description: stairwell opens to reveal Gothic vaulted ceiling and wall lantern becomes visible
natural light streams through an arched window on the left wall

agents.ego_description: continuing to climb the stairs as the architecture transitions to Gothic style with vaulted ceilings

entered.detail: lit wall-mounted lantern casting warm light on the stone wall
pointed Gothic archway framing the upper stairwell
tall stone support column with carved details
tall arched window allowing natural light to enter the stairwell

segments.scene_description: As the character ascends higher, the stairwell opens into a grander Gothic architectural space with vaulted ceilings and stone columns. A wall lantern provides warm illumination, and natural light begins to filter through an arched window, transitioning the atmosphere from dim and enclosed to brighter and more ornate.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper stairwell approaching bright exterior exit

events.description: approaching bright exit at top of stairs with intense backlighting

agents.ego_description: climbing the final steps toward the brightly lit exit at the top of the staircase

entered.detail: stone archway leading to brightly lit exterior or upper chamber
decorative stone railing along the right side of the upper stairs

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the top of the staircase where bright light floods through a large exit archway. The Gothic architecture continues with stone balcony railings visible as the character nears the transition from the enclosed stairwell to the illuminated space beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character transitions from a dim, enclosed stone corridor into a luminous, grand Gothic hall. It begins with the character opening an ornate wooden door and stepping into a dark, narrow stairwell flanked by rough stone walls and a wooden handrail. As the character ascends, the cramped space gradually expands into a larger architectural area where vaulted ceilings and stone columns emerge from the shadows. The atmosphere shifts from dimness to warmth as a wall lantern flickers and natural light begins to filter through an arched window. The scene finally opens completely as the character reaches the top of the stairs, moving toward a large exit archway where bright light floods across stone balcony railings.
